name: ThreatQ
description: Integrates a variety of ThreatQ services into Splunk SOAR

parameters.name: indicator_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of indicator values

parameters.name: exact
parameters.description: Do we want to find an exact match or an approximate match?

parameters.name: with_all_relationships
parameters.description: Should we fetch all relationships with this action?

parameters.name: indicator_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of indicators and indicator type (optional) name/value pairs (e.g.: IP Address: 1.1.1.1)

parameters.name: indicator_status
parameters.description: The default status for the indicators uploaded to ThreatQ

parameters.name: adversary_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of adversary names

parameters.name: object_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of custom object values

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: The object type of the specified list values

actions.name: Add Attribute
actions.description: Adds an attribute to objects in ThreatQ

parameters.name: object_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of object values

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: The object type of the specified list values

parameters.name: attribute_name
parameters.description: The name of the attribute in ThreatQ

parameters.name: attribute_value
parameters.description: The value fo the attribute in ThreatQ

actions.name: Add Comment
actions.description: Adds a comment to objects in ThreatQ

parameters.name: object_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of object values

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: The object type of the specified list values

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: The comment to add to the objects

actions.name: Add Tag
actions.description: Adds a tag to objects in ThreatQ

parameters.name: object_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of object values

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: The object type of the specified list values

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: The tag to add to the objects

actions.name: Set Indicator Status
actions.description: Set a status for a given list of indicators

parameters.name: indicator_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of indicators and indicator type (optional) name/value pairs (e.g.: IP Address: 1.1.1.1)

parameters.name: indicator_status
parameters.description: The status to give to the list of indicators

parameters.name: task_prefix
parameters.description: Prefix for the task name

parameters.name: task_name
parameters.description: Task name

parameters.name: assigned_to
parameters.description: ThreatQ user to assign the task to

parameters.name: task_status
parameters.description: Task status in ThreatQ

parameters.name: task_priority
parameters.description: Task priority in ThreatQ

parameters.name: task_description
parameters.description: Task description in ThreatQ

parameters.name: indicator_list
parameters.description: List of indicator values (use format node)

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description: The event type in ThreatQ

parameters.name: indicator_list
parameters.description: List of comma-separated or line-separated indicator

parameters.name: investigation_name
parameters.description: The investigation name

parameters.name: investigation_priority
parameters.description: The investigation's priority

parameters.name: investigation_visibility
parameters.description: The investigation's sharing status

parameters.name: investigation_description
parameters.description: The investigation's description

parameters.name: indicator_list
parameters.description: List of comma-separated or line-separated indicator

actions.name: Upload Spearphish
actions.description: Upload a spearphish attempt to ThreatQ

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: The Vault ID for the spearphish email file

parameters.name: indicator_status
parameters.description: Default indicator status. If none selected, Review is used

actions.name: Upload File
actions.description: Upload (and parse) a file to ThreatQ

parameters.name: vault_id
parameters.description: The Vault ID for the file to upload

parameters.name: parse_for_indicators
parameters.description: Whether or not to parse the file for indicators

parameters.name: indicator_status
parameters.description: Default indicator status. If none selected, Review is used

actions.name: Get Related Objects
actions.description: Query ThreatQ for an object's relationships

parameters.name: object_list
parameters.description: A comma-separated or line-separated list of custom object values

parameters.name: object_type
parameters.description: The object type of the specified list values

parameters.name: related_object_type
parameters.description: The object type of the relationships you want to find

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.description: The name for the signature uploaded to ThreatQ

parameters.name: signature_value
parameters.description: The value for the signature uploaded to ThreatQ

parameters.name: signature_type
parameters.description: The type for the signature uploaded to ThreatQ

parameters.name: signature_status
parameters.description: The status for the signature uploaded to ThreatQ
